name: ClawText

branding.title: ClawText — Memory Skill for OpenClaw Agents
branding.tagline: Production-grade memory system. Agents that learn, remember, and scale.
branding.description: ClawText transforms basic agent memory into a robust, tiered system. Capture conversations automatically. Retrieve relevant context in sub-millisecond. Share memory across agents. Maintain everything automatically.

positioning.problem: Every agent conversation starts from zero. Agents forget decisions, lessons, context, and what other agents learned. This kills productivity.
positioning.solution: ClawText captures, organizes, and injects relevant memories into every prompt. Agents remember. Agents learn. Agents improve over time.
positioning.benefit: Stop re-explaining context. Start building on past work. Agents that actually remember compound value.

keyFeatures.name: Sub-Millisecond Retrieval
keyFeatures.description: Hot cache serves 98%+ of queries in <1ms. Memory injection adds microseconds to prompts.
keyFeatures.impact: Instant memory context without latency penalty

keyFeatures.name: Four-Tier Architecture
keyFeatures.description: L1 (hot cache) → L2 (curated) → L3 (archive) → L4 (staging). Right memory at right time.
keyFeatures.impact: Fast for frequent queries, deep for historical search, sustainable long-term

keyFeatures.name: Multi-Agent Memory
keyFeatures.description: Shared, private, and cross-agent memory visibility. One system. Many agents. All learning together.
keyFeatures.impact: Agents collaborate through memory. Team knowledge compounds.

keyFeatures.name: Automatic Continuity
keyFeatures.description: SessionId + relatesToSession tracking. Agents pick up mid-conversation.

keyFeatures.name: Intelligent Retrieval (No Vector DB)
keyFeatures.description: BM25 + semantic clustering. No external APIs. No embedding service required.
keyFeatures.impact: Fast, transparent, zero dependency, instant tuning

keyFeatures.name: Self-Monitoring
keyFeatures.description: Health reports with actionable recommendations. System alerts you to problems.
keyFeatures.impact: Maintenance happens automatically with agent guidance

keyFeatures.name: Programmable API + CLI
keyFeatures.description: Add, search, and inject memories from code or CLI.

keyFeatures.name: Two Memory Paths
keyFeatures.description: Conversational memory (auto-captured) + Knowledge repos (bulk-loaded). Each optimized for its purpose.
keyFeatures.impact: Efficient token usage. Relevant context at prompt time.

documentation.quick_start: 5 minutes from git clone to working memory system
documentation.architecture_docs: Deep dive on tiers, algorithms, performance tuning
documentation.integration_guide: How to add ClawText to your OpenClaw setup

comparison.vs_mem0: Multi-tier + no API calls + built for OpenClaw
comparison.vs_manual_memory_md: Automatic capture, intelligent retrieval, multi-agent sharing
comparison.vs_vector_db: BM25 + clustering faster, cheaper, transparent, no API dependency

useCases: Teams building on each other's discoveries

relatedSkills.name: ClawText Ingest
relatedSkills.relationship: Companion tool for bulk knowledge loading (Discord, GitHub, docs)
